<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The text board seems to have encoding issues (Japanese characters not rendering properly in the console output), but the SFEN is clear: `lnsgkgsnl/1r5b1/ppppppppp/9/9/9/PPPPPPPPP/1B5R1/LNSGKGSNL b - 1` - this is the initial position, and it's sente's turn (b = black = sente in SFEN).

Now I need to wait for the user to make their first move. The user is sente, so they move first. I should use the wait-for-user-move API endpoint. But this is a blocking call that waits up to 5 minutes. 

I'll call the wait-move endpoint with a long timeout to give the user time to make their move on the GUI.</details></think>

```

```

あなたが先手です。GUI画面で最初の一手を指してください。お待ちしています。
